overall.description: A first-person exploration through a cyberpunk-traditional Japanese courtyard in a video game. The camera moves from a covered stone corridor into an open gravel courtyard featuring a large central tree, where two NPCs tend to the garden, before approaching a wooden staircase bathed in golden hour sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered corridor lined with stone pillars and blue holographic signs

entered.detail: massive rectangular stone pillars supporting the corridor roof
futuristic blue glowing symbols hanging from the ceiling
dark wooden beam ceiling with integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow covered corridor with massive stone pillars and futuristic blue holographic signs. The space is artificially lit and enclosed, with smooth stone flooring underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese courtyard with central tree

events.description: exits the covered corridor and enters the open-air gravel courtyard

agents.ego_description: turning left and stepping from the corridor into the sunlit courtyard, approaching the central tree

entered.detail: large mature tree with twisting trunk and green canopy growing from a stone planter
two-story wooden structure with white plaster panels and dark timber framing
raked grey gravel covering the courtyard floor
circular concrete planter surrounding the tree base with integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into a traditional Japanese courtyard, revealing a large central tree in a stone planter surrounded by raked gravel. A timber-framed building stands to the left as the lighting shifts from artificial to natural mixed light.

agents.ego_description: circling clockwise around the central tree while observing two gardeners tending to the garden

notable_agents.action: crouching near the tree planter, tending to the gravel or plants with hands
kneeling by the tree base, performing gardening maintenance work

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the courtyard tree where two NPC gardeners are crouched performing maintenance. The traditional building rotates from left to right in the frame as the camera moves around the gravel garden, with warm natural sunlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase approach with sunset lighting

events.description: camera turns to face the setting sun, creating strong backlight and golden hour glow

agents.ego_description: moving toward and beginning to ascend the wooden stairs on the right side of the courtyard

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with metal railings and illuminated stone lanterns along the sides
traditional shoji screens glowing with warm interior light
rectangular stone lights lining the stairway approach

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the tree toward a grand wooden staircase on the right, passing stone lanterns and approaching the steps. The setting sun creates a dramatic backlight as the scene transitions from the open courtyard to the semi-covered stairway approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, futuristic corridor into a traditional Japanese courtyard bathed in the glow of a setting sun. It begins with a walk through a narrow, enclosed space defined by massive stone pillars and blue holographic signs under artificial lighting. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the environment opens into a wide gravel garden featuring a large central tree, while the lighting shifts from synthetic blue to a mix of natural light. The camera then circles the tree and two crouched gardeners, causing the adjacent timber-framed building to rotate across the frame as the sunlight grows warmer. Finally, the view moves away from the garden and passes stone lanterns toward a grand wooden staircase, where the scene concludes under the dramatic backlight of the setting sun.
